title: Sakura PVP Pack
description: A Minecraft Sakura themed pvp texture pack made for PVP and great looks
body:
**A Sakura themed pvp pack this packs Contains following things in Sakura themed Style:**
- Respawn Anchor
- Glowstone
- Obsidian
- End Crystal
- Shield
- Hotbar
- Hearts
- Experience Bar
- Hotbar Selection
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Items
- all swords
- enchant glint
- end crystal Item
- low shield
- low fire
- better particles
